basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Project Assistant I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) has released the official Project Assistant I Notification 2026 at iitgn.ac.in. A total of 01 vacancy has been announced under the IIT Gandhinagar Project Assistant I Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 30 years of age with a Master's degree in Archaeology, Ancient Indian History and Culture, Heritage and Museum Studies, or Society and Culture are eligible to apply online on or before 31 August 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Master in Archaeology, Ancient Indian History and Culture, Heritage and Museum Studies, or Society and Culture.
qualification.details: Master in any of the following disciplines (or related disciplines): Archaeology, Ancient Indian History and Culture, Heritage and Museum Studies, Society and Culture. Scholars with field research experience in archaeology and documentation of ancient artefacts are encouraged to apply. Fluent writing skills in English.

salary_details.details: Consolidated remuneration of ₹28,000/- to ₹44,000/- per month.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Gandhinagar Project Assistant-I Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Gandhinagar Project Assistant I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Project Assistant I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Gandhinagar Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Scholars with field research experience in archaeology and documentation of ancient artefacts are encouraged to apply. Fluent writing skills in English.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Gandhinagar Project Assistant-I Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Project Assistant I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Assistant-I position at IIT Gandhinagar?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Project Assistant-I position is 31 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant-I role?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Master's degree in Archaeology, Ancient Indian History and Culture, Heritage and Museum Studies, or Society and Culture.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not explicitly mention age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for specific information.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant-I position?
faq.answer: The consolidated remuneration for the Project Assistant-I position ranges from ₹28,000/- to ₹44,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Project Assistant-I recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official IIT Gandhinagar recruitment portal.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Project Assistant-I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Assistant-I position.

faq.question: Q7. Does IIT Gandhinagar require any specific experience for this role?
faq.answer: While not mandatory, scholars with field research experience in archaeology and documentation of ancient artefacts are encouraged to apply.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is online.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Project Assistant-I is a temporary role.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
